programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.0m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 1.4m swell and cross-shore wind suggests some bumpy rides and perhaps a few closeouts today.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 19.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
